'''wokagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wreathing|wreathing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wreathing|wreathing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wokagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokagithi|wokagithi]] || [[word:wokagiji|wokagiji]] || [[word:wokagishi|wokagishi]] || [[word:wokagiki|wokagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokaguthuthu|wokaguthuthu]] || [[word:wokagujuju|wokagujuju]] || [[word:wokagushushu|wokagushushu]] || [[word:wokagukuku|wokagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokaguthu|wokaguthu]] || [[word:wokaguju|wokaguju]] || [[word:wokagushu|wokagushu]] || [[word:wokaguku|wokaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokagufthuf|wokagufthuf]] || [[word:wokagufjuf|wokagufjuf]] || [[word:wokagufshuf|wokagufshuf]] || [[word:wokagufkuf|wokagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokagethe|wokagethe]] || [[word:wokageje|wokageje]] || [[word:wokageshe|wokageshe]] || [[word:wokageke|wokageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokagothotho|wokagothotho]] || [[word:wokagojojo|wokagojojo]] || [[word:wokagoshosho|wokagoshosho]] || [[word:wokagokoko|wokagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokagotho|wokagotho]] || [[word:wokagojo|wokagojo]] || [[word:wokagosho|wokagosho]] || [[word:wokagoko|wokagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokagofthof|wokagofthof]] || [[word:wokagofjof|wokagofjof]] || [[word:wokagofshof|wokagofshof]] || [[word:wokagofkof|wokagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfthÃŸf|wokagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfjÃŸf|wokagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfshÃŸf|wokagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfkÃŸf|wokagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wokagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wokagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wokagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wokagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfthÃŸf|wokagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfjÃŸf|wokagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfshÃŸf|wokagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfkÃŸf|wokagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfthÃŸf|wokagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfjÃŸf|wokagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfshÃŸf|wokagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wokagÃŸfkÃŸf|wokagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokagÃḊthÃḊ|wokagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wokagÃḊjÃḊ|wokagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wokagÃḊshÃḊ|wokagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wokagÃḊkÃḊ|wokagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokagathatha|wokagathatha]] || [[word:wokagajaja|wokagajaja]] || [[word:wokagashasha|wokagashasha]] || [[word:wokagakaka|wokagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokagatha|wokagatha]] || [[word:wokagaja|wokagaja]] || [[word:wokagasha|wokagasha]] || [[word:wokagaka|wokagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokagafthaf|wokagafthaf]] || [[word:wokagafjaf|wokagafjaf]] || [[word:wokagafshaf|wokagafshaf]] || [[word:wokagafkaf|wokagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wokagasha|wokagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokagshÃḋsha|wokagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokagrosha|wokagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokagmusha|wokagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokagyasha|wokagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokagnkshÃḋsha|gowokagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokagnkrosha|gowokagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokagnkmusha|gowokagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokagnkyasha|gowokagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wokakagasha|wokakagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokakagshÃḋsha|wokakagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokakagrosha|wokakagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokakagmusha|wokakagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokakagyasha|wokakagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokakagnkshÃḋsha|gowokakagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokakagnkrosha|gowokakagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokakagnkmusha|gowokakagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokakagnkyasha|gowokakagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wekÃḊgasha|wekÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wekÃḊgshÃḋsha|wekÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wekÃḊgrosha|wekÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wekÃḊgmusha|wekÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wekÃḊgyasha|wekÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowekÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|gowekÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowekÃḊgnkrosha|gowekÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowekÃḊgnkmusha|gowekÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowekÃḊgnkyasha|gowekÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wokfagasha|wokfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokfagshÃḋsha|wokfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokfagrosha|wokfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokfagmusha|wokfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokfagyasha|wokfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokfagnkshÃḋsha|gowokfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokfagnkrosha|gowokfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokfagnkmusha|gowokfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokfagnkyasha|gowokfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
